name: Ego-Robot
caption: The autonomous agent platform equipped with panoramic sensing. Current mission: Navigate to the farthest identified object across room boundaries.

name: chair
caption: The blue ergonomic chair features a breathable mesh backrest and a pneumatic height adjustment lever. It is positioned near the left wall, affording a comfortable workspace for users.
instruction: Navigate to the blue ergonomic chair featuring a breathable mesh backrest and a pneumatic height adjustment lever, located near the wall.

name: table
caption: A heavy green rectangular table made of solid oak with a polished finish. Its wide surface provides ample space for placing office equipment and performing collaborative team tasks.
instruction: Go to the heavy green rectangular table made of solid oak with a polished finish.

name: cabinet
caption: This orange metal cabinet contains three secured drawers with silver handles. It is designed for document storage and fits perfectly into the narrow corner of the hallway area.
instruction: Find the orange metal cabinet with three secured drawers and silver handles located in the corner of the hallway area.

name: screen
caption: A purple high-definition display monitor mounted on an adjustable swivel arm. It affords clear visibility of system data and is connected via a thick black cable to the desk below.
instruction: Navigate to the purple high-definition display monitor mounted on an adjustable swivel arm and connected by a thick black cable.

name: chair
caption: A blue folding chair with a lightweight aluminum frame. It is currently placed against the partition, providing temporary seating that can be easily stored when the floor space is needed.
instruction: Find the blue folding chair with a lightweight aluminum frame that is placed against the partition.

caption: The green circular table sits on a tripod base. It is ideal for small coffee breaks and affords enough surface area for two laptops and several notebooks in a lounge setting.
